# User Guide

This folder explains BlobFin from an application user perspective. It focuses on what to enter, which options influence calculations, and how to read the results.

## Sections

- [Getting Started](getting-started.md): start the app and understand local storage.
- [Reserve Planning](reserve-planning.md): configure income, expense, savings, reserve, interest, and cashback positions.
- [Investment Planning](investment-planning.md): configure retirement and withdrawal assumptions and read the asset projection.
- [Data, Export, And Reset](data-export-reset.md): save behavior, CSV export/import, and reset behavior.

## Main Workflow

1. Enter the basic year, account interest, and cashback rate.
2. Build the income, expense, and savings tables with all relevant positions.
3. Mark which positions are active, visible, interest-bearing, cashback-enabled, or investable.
4. Check the yearly table and result metrics.
5. Select investable positions for the investment projection.
6. Configure age, return, tax, inflation, reserve, withdrawal, and payout assumptions.
7. Inspect the investment chart and statistics.
